items.title: GSK spends $1bn on rights to SiranBio’s metabolic oligonucleotide
items.summary: This deal aligns with GSK's focus on addressing the complications of obesity, while restocking its pipeline amid key patent expiries.

items.title: Podcast: Autonomous labs redefine the role of biopharma researchers
items.summary: Ginkgo Bioworks CEO Jason Kelly discusses the company’s work on autonomous labs and their impact on biopharma R&D.

items.title: Eli Lilly pledges $4.5bn to bolster Indiana-based manufacturing
items.summary: When Eli Lilly's Lebanon campus is complete, it will manufacture several of the pharma's APIs and genetic medicines to serve US patients.

items.title: Daiichi Sankyo and Waiv partner for ADC biomarkers
items.summary: Daiichi Sankyo has entered into a collaboration with Paris-based Waiv intended at digital pathology biomarker discovery for an ADC programme.

items.title: Halozyme and Oruka sign agreement for Hypercon technology
items.summary: Halozyme Hypercon has signed an exclusive global collaboration and licence agreement with Oruka Therapeutics to develop ORKA-001 using Hypercon Technology.
